name: Split A File Into Pieces - Linux
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Igor Fits, oscd.community
SIGMA Title: Split A File Into Pieces - Linux
SIGMA Description: Detection use of the command "split" to split files into parts and possible transfer.

False positives:
- Legitimate administrative activity

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=11 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%syscall%' AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%split%' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Split A File Into Pieces - Linux on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event matches devicetype=11 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%syscall%' AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%split%' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Split A File Into Pieces - Linux
